name: Flowborn (Marksman)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Channels the Flow into the body to gain Attack Speed and enhance one of four stats: Health/Attack/Movement Speed/Cooldown.
Can spend Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals piercing physical damage.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description: Deals physical damage to nearby enemies and knocks them back. Gains Health recovery, 5 stacks of Flow, and reduces the cooldown of Arrow of No Retreat and Arrowstorm.

skills.name: Arrow of No Retreat
skills.description: Shoots an enormous projectile at the target, dealing physical damage and knocking back non-hero units. Can dash a short distance after use.

skills.name: Arrowstorm
skills.description: Shoots multiple light projectiles at the target area, dealing physical damage and gaining Movement Speed.

tips: Flowborn (Marksman) is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.8% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Dexterity → Sparkforged Dagger → Doomsday → Mortal Punisher → Shadow Ripper → Eternity Blade.
Run Fate, Penetration for stats that match Flowborn (Marksman)'s Marksman kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Convergence → Arrow of No Retreat → Arrowstorm → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Flowborn (Marksman) excels into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

Flowborn (Marksman) is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Flowborn (Marksman).

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Marksman) good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Marksman) is Tier A Marksman with 51.8% win rate, 1.0% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Flowborn (Marksman) build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday, Mortal Punisher, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade. Run Fate, Penetration arcana with Flash & Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Flowborn (Marksman)?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur into Flowborn (Marksman). Deny Farm Lane resources early and force fights before Flowborn (Marksman) completes core items. Flowborn (Marksman) struggles when the enemy can dive and burst them.

faqs.question: Who does Flowborn (Marksman) counter?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Marksman) is strong into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Flowborn (Marksman) when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Farm Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Marksman) good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Marksman) is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Flowborn (Marksman).

faqs.question: What lane should Flowborn (Marksman) play?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Marksman) is tagged Farm Lane in Camp export (Marksman). Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Flowborn (Marksman)?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate, Penetration arcana. Battle spell: Flash & Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Flowborn (Marksman) or Hou Yi — which is better?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Marksman) vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Flowborn (Marksman) has +2.5% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Flowborn (Marksman) when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Flowborn (Marksman)?
faqs.answer: Optional ban when enemy spams Marksman; 1.0% pick rate but only 0.1% ban rate.
